characters.description: The narrator, broke in the run-up to the holidays and convinced, after an advertising stunt goes wrong, that the law is after him. His guilty conscience and a monster snowstorm make this the most claustrophobic winter of his journal.
characters.name: Greg Heffley

characters.description: Greg's best friend and partner in his holiday money-making schemes, including the advertising effort that gets them into trouble.
characters.name: Rowley Jefferson

characters.description: Greg's teenage older brother, no easier to share a snowed-in house with than he is to share a normal one.
characters.name: Rodrick Heffley

characters.description: Greg's toddler brother, whose behaviour during the blackout produces one of the book's biggest surprises.
characters.name: Manny Heffley

characters.description: Greg's father, who is away when the storm hits, leaving the rest of the family snowed in without him.
characters.name: Frank Heffley

characters.description: Greg's mother, who holds the household together through the storm, the blackout, and the dwindling supplies.
characters.name: Susan Heffley
